stemHtml: Radar controllers can give traffic information. Which of the following transmissions is likely to require the pilot to alter heading in the near future? (F-BVZG, TRAFFIC...)

options.a: ELEVEN O’CLOCK, SIX MILES, CLOSING, 500 FEET BELOW DESCENDING.
options.b: TWELVE O`CLOCK, FIVE MILES, OPPOSITE DIRECTION, SAME LEVEL.
options.c: TWO O’CLOCK, SIX MILES, SAME DIRECTION, 500 FEET ABOVE, CLIMBING.
options.d: ONE O’CLOCK, THREE MILES, CROSSING LEFT TO RIGHT, SAME LEVEL.
